context: Tests whether the agent correctly rejects an invalid backward phase transition by not modifying state.json, informing the user of valid transitions, directing them to /reopen, and logging a Process warning to decisions.md.

checklist.name: state.json current_phase unchanged
checklist.description: Output .arch/state.json still has `current_phase` set to `"methodology"` — the backward transition to `"evaluation"` was NOT applied

checklist.name: Transition rejection communicated
checklist.description: response.md (or decisions.md) contains a message stating the requested transition is not valid or not allowed

checklist.name: Valid forward transitions stated
checklist.description: response.md or the output communicates what the valid next phase(s) are from methodology

checklist.name: Directs to /reopen
checklist.description: response.md or the output explicitly directs the user to use `/reopen` for backward transitions

checklist.name: Process warning logged
checklist.description: .arch/decisions.md contains a new entry with category `Process` recording the invalid transition attempt
